untranslatable_reason: Broadening Bottom pattern recognition requires multi-bar price structure analysis (identifying widening lows and highs, convergence/divergence of support/resistance lines, and breakout confirmation). This cannot be expressed using only single-bar price and technical indicators without access to historical bar sequence pattern matching or explicit pattern detection functions.
translation_notes: Provided a best-effort approximation using Donchian channel breakouts (which detect volatility expansion) combined with ADX confirmation to approximate trend-aligned breakouts. However, true BB pattern identification requires visual/structural pattern recognition beyond the allowed indicator set. The 62% success rate in bull markets and 34% in bear markets should be used for regime-specific position sizing if pattern detection is implemented separately.
